en: OF DAVID.The LORD is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear? The LORD is the stronghold of my life; of whom shall I be afraid?
zh: 耶和華是我的亮光，是我的救恩， 我還怕誰呢？ 耶和華是我性命的避難所， 我還懼誰呢？

en: When evildoers assail me to eat up my flesh, my adversaries and foes, it is they who stumble and fall.
zh: 那些作惡的，就是我的敵人、我的仇敵， 他們逼近我，要吃我肉的時候， 就絆跌仆倒。

en: Though an army encamp against me, my heart shall not fear; though war arise against me, yet I will be confident.
zh: 雖有軍兵紮營攻擊我， 我的心也不害怕； 雖然發動戰爭攻擊我， 我仍舊安穩。

en: One thing have I asked of the LORD, that will I seek after: that I may dwell in the house of the LORD all the days of my life, to gaze upon the beauty of the LORD and to inquire in his temple.
zh: 有一件事我求過耶和華，我還要尋求； 我要一生一世住在耶和華的殿裡， 瞻仰他的榮美，在他的殿中求問。

en: For he will hide me in his shelter in the day of trouble; he will conceal me under the cover of his tent; he will lift me high upon a rock.
zh: 因為在我遭難的日子， 他必把我藏在他的帳棚裡， 把我隱藏在他帳幕的隱密處， 又把我高舉在磐石上。

en: And now my head shall be lifted up above my enemies all around me, and I will offer in his tent sacrifices with shouts of joy; I will sing and make melody to the LORD.
zh: 現在，我可以抬起頭來， 高過我四周的仇敵； 我要在他的帳幕裡，獻上歡呼的祭； 我要歌唱，頌讚耶和華。

en: Hear, O LORD, when I cry aloud; be gracious to me and answer me!
zh: 耶和華啊！我發聲呼求的時候，求你垂聽； 求你恩待我，應允我。

en: You have said, "Seek my face." My heart says to you, "Your face, LORD, do I seek."
zh: 你說：“你們要尋求我的面！” 那時我的心對你說： “耶和華啊！你的面我正要尋求。”

en: Hide not your face from me. Turn not your servant away in anger, O you who have been my help. Cast me not off; forsake me not, O God of my salvation!
zh: 求你不要向我掩面， 不要發怒趕逐你的僕人， 你一向是幫助我的。 拯救我的 神啊！ 求你不要撇下我，也不要離棄我。

en: For my father and my mother have forsaken me, but the LORD will take me in.
zh: 雖然我的父母離棄我， 耶和華卻收留我。

en: Teach me your way, O LORD, and lead me on a level path because of my enemies.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你指示我你的道路； 為我仇敵的緣故引導我走平坦的路。

en: Give me not up to the will of my adversaries; for false witnesses have risen against me, and they breathe out violence.
zh: 求你不要照著我敵人的心願，把我交給他們， 因為有作假見證的人起來攻擊我， 並且口出兇暴的話。

en: I believe that I shall look upon the goodness of the LORD in the land of the living!
zh: 我還是相信，在活人之地， 我可以看見耶和華的恩惠。

en: Wait for the LORD; be strong, and let your heart take courage; wait for the LORD!
zh: 你要等候耶和華， 要剛強，要堅定你的心， 要等候耶和華。
